theme_and_archetype.description: A premium, sophisticated 'trust stack' for the post-Yotpo era. Combining deep navy and sparing gold accents to convey truth, radical transparency, and premium quality.

brand_identity.logo_description: ORIGAMI PENTAGONAL STAR (5-point) - Folded paper star with concentric SVG gradients giving depth. Center has a circular medallion with gold ring containing a checkmark (✓), 'ES VERIFIED', merchant logo, or '★★★ 4.9' depending on use case.
brand_identity.voice: Confident, witty, slightly contrarian - 'every star earned, not bought'
brand_identity.vibe: Radical transparency rendered as design, feeling like a confident manifesto rather than a hype machine.

typography.installation: Add Google Fonts links for 'Instrument Serif' and 'Plus Jakarta Sans'.

hierarchy.h1_hero: font-heading italic text-5xl sm:text-6xl+ tracking-tight text-white
hierarchy.label: font-body text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-bold

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more spacing. Focus on asymmetric, left-aligned layouts. Let the content breathe.

surface_strategies.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border border-white/20 shadow-sm (for sticky navs over light backgrounds) or bg-navy/60 border-white/10 (over dark backgrounds)
surface_strategies.cards_marketing: bg-white border border-slate-200/50 shadow-sm p-8 rounded-xl
surface_strategies.cards_dashboard: bg-white border border-slate-200 p-6 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
surface_strategies.dark_sections: bg-[#0F2044] text-white border-y border-white/10 relative overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#FDE68A] to-[#B45309] text-white font-bold py-3 px-6 rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#0F2044] text-[#0F2044] font-bold py-3 px-6 rounded-lg hover:bg-[#0F2044] hover:text-white transition-colors
buttons.dark_mode_secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white font-bold py-3 px-6 rounded-lg hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors

badges.verified: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-[#FAFAF9] border border-slate-200 text-xs font-bold text-[#0F2044]

tables.header_cell: p-4 border-b-2 border-[#0F2044] font-heading text-xl text-[#0F2044]

inputs.default: w-full bg-transparent border-b-2 border-slate-300 py-3 px-0 text-lg focus:outline-none focus:border-[#0F2044] transition-colors rounded-none placeholder:text-slate-400

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Subtle transform -translate-y-1 on cards. Buttons scale by 1.02.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered entrance reveals for text blocks. Lottie-style 'unfold' animation for the origami star logo.
motion_and_interactions.counters: Live ticking animation for trust receipts counter. Numbers should feel ALIVE.

icons.usage: Use crisp, minimalist icons. Avoid emoji.

hero_visuals.description: Abstract golden podium with shadows. Perfect for a premium 'trust' visual backdrop or the Audit Tool hero.

team_portraits.description: Smiling female business owner. Use in testimonials or 'Yotpo Refugees' migration section.
Confident male shop owner. Use in testimonial or successful merchant showcase.

logos.description: Premium brand logo example for merchant mockups.
Tech company logo for integrations section (e.g. replacing Klaviyo/Attentive).

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive elements must include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case, role-based format (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').

pages_to_build.marketing_homepage: Hero with dark navy bg, live Trust Receipts counter, comparison table, asymmetric manifesto block.
pages_to_build.pricing_page: 8 tiers with toggle, comparison matrix, Yotpo Exodus banner.
pages_to_build.merchant_dashboard: Clean white/off-white dashboard, KPI row, recent reviews, sentiment clusters.
pages_to_build.public_store_profile: Merchant profile page with AI summary, verified reviews list, Moderation Ledger link.
pages_to_build.trust_receipt_modal: Detailed modal showing AI fraud score and order hash.
pages_to_build.manifesto_page: Editorial style page with bold typography on off-white.
pages_to_build.free_review_audit_tool: Landing page to paste URL and get AI fraud estimate.
pages_to_build.yotpo_refugees_migration: High conversion landing page targeted at Yotpo switchers.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML tags (`div`, `section`, `span`) combined with Tailwind for complex marketing layouts. Use Shadcn sparingly on marketing pages.
For the Merchant Dashboard and complex interactive logic (modals, selects), use Shadcn components but style them to fit the clean, flat, premium look.
Integrate the brand logo as an SVG with the description provided in `logo_description`.
Avoid generic purple gradients or emoji.
Build the ticking counter using React state or Framer Motion for the Trust Receipts.
